# OpenCV.js build

- Source: <https://docs.opencv.org/4.x/opencv.js>
- Captured: 2026-07-08
- File: `opencv-63366510.js`
- SHA-256: `63366510248ADF3A7EDDF3E793DD825404EFB7DF3749F4D6F8557C7FA4CA8AA0`
- Project license: Apache License 2.0

The source URL tracks OpenCV's current 4.x documentation build. This repository
stores the captured file so production clients always receive the tested build
instead of whatever the moving URL contains later.
